browserSource.off: Not enabled. Turn this on in System Settings if OBS needs it.
browserSource.title: OBS browser source

crashRecovery.found: There's an unfinished match saved from a previous session. Restore it from the notification on the dashboard, or dismiss it, before starting a new one.
crashRecovery.none: No unfinished match from a previous session.
crashRecovery.title: Previous match

diskSpace.low: Free disk space is low ({{freeMb}} MB). PlayOverlay may struggle to save your match.
diskSpace.title: Disk space
diskSpace.unknown: Free disk space couldn't be checked on this system.

displayWindowReady.notReady: The output window hasn't loaded yet. Give it a moment, or use Window Settings to reset the windows.
displayWindowReady.ready: The output window is open and ready.
displayWindowReady.title: Output window

displays.sameScreen: The output window and the control window are on the same screen. Move the output window to the second screen before kickoff.
displays.separated: The output window is on its own screen, away from the control window.
displays.singleScreen: Only one screen detected. You can still send the scoreboard to OBS as a browser source.
displays.title: Second display

missingAssets.missing: Missing: {{count}} ({{titles}}). Check Team Settings and Custom Screens.
missingAssets.ok: All team logos and graphics are present.
missingAssets.title: Team logos and graphics

remoteControl.off: Not enabled. Turn this on in System Settings if a phone will be used.
remoteControl.title: Phone remote

shortcuts.failed: Not registered: {{count}} ({{accelerators}}), probably already used by another app.
shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts

modal.intro: A quick check before kickoff. This only looks, it never changes anything.
modal.loadError: Couldn't run the check. Try again.

summary.allClear: All clear, you're ready to go live.
summary.problems: Problems to fix before you go live: {{count}}.

modal.title: Go live check
